title: 1Password & Podman Kube Play Secrets
body:
I'm trying to understand how I can use secrets in Podman Kube Play in a secure way. Committing secrets in cleartext into my GitHub repo is not an option. I would like to use my password manager 1Password instead. Is this possible somehow? I know it exists a 1Password Secrets Injector for Kubernetes, but that is not possible to use with Podman Kube Play, right?

https://github.com/1password/kubernetes-secrets-injector
https://github.com/1Password/onepassword-operator

comments.body: consider encrypt your secret by sops
